reviews.author: James T.
reviews.text: Best hotel we've stayed at in Bali. Far from the tourist crowds, the reef right off the beach is stunning. Already planning to return.

reviews.author: Sophie L.
reviews.text: We came for a honeymoon and it exceeded every expectation. The candlelit dinner by the water was unforgettable. Merci mille fois!

reviews.author: David H.
reviews.text: Candidasa is a gem and this hotel does it justice. Diving at Liberty wreck was incredible — the team organised everything perfectly.

reviews.author: Marco B.
reviews.text: The garden cottages are beautiful — spacious, well-designed, with perfect AC. Breakfast was fresh and delicious every morning.

reviews.author: Sarah W.
reviews.text: Hidden gem in East Bali. No loud parties, no crowds — just nature, kindness, and incredibly good food. This is what Bali should be.

reviews.author: Erik N.
reviews.text: Snorkelling from the beach was incredible — rich coral, sea turtles, the works. Very peaceful atmosphere. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Yuki T.
reviews.text: Such a calm and beautiful resort. The staff went out of their way to make our stay special. The pool view at sunset is breathtaking.

reviews.author: Claire D.
reviews.text: We spent 10 days here and didn't want to leave. The location is ideal — tranquil but close to Amed and Ubud. Perfect base for East Bali.

text.en: Absolutely magical place. The staff remembered our names from day one. Woke up to the sound of waves every morning — pure paradise.
text.ru: Абсолютно волшебное место. Персонал запомнил наши имена с первого дня. Каждое утро просыпались под шум волн — настоящий рай.

text.en: A quiet, cosy place far from the tourist crowds. The staff is incredibly attentive. The pool and beach are the perfect spots to unwind.
text.ru: Тихое, уютное место вдали от туристических толп. Персонал невероятно внимателен. Бассейн и пляж — лучшее место для отдыха.

text.en: We stayed as a family. The kids loved the pool and the adults loved the peace and beauty. We will definitely be back!
text.ru: Останавливались с семьёй. Дети в восторге от бассейна, взрослые — от тишины и красоты. Обязательно вернёмся!

text.en: Service at the highest level. The spa treatments are simply magical. The room is clean and beautiful. This is the best hotel in Candidasa.
text.ru: Сервис на высшем уровне. Спа-процедуры просто волшебные. Номер чистый и красивый. Это лучший отель в Кандидасе.

reviews.author: Thomas B.
reviews.text: We drove up from Seminyak specifically for East Bali and this hotel was the perfect base. The reef in front teems with life — we spotted a sea turtle on our first snorkel.

reviews.author: Lena K.
reviews.text: The breakfast with fresh tropical fruit every morning set the tone perfectly. Staff organised a Kintamani volcano sunrise drive that was worth the early alarm.

reviews.author: Carlos M.
reviews.text: This little gem sits quietly above an incredible reef. We booked for five nights and extended to nine. The pool at sunset is worth the trip alone.

reviews.author: Isabel R.
reviews.text: Far from the chaos of Kuta, this is the Bali I was hoping to find. Warm staff, a beautiful pool, and the beach just a short walk away.

reviews.author: Ji-Yeon P.
reviews.text: The cottage was spotless and peaceful with a beautiful garden view. Staff made every day feel effortless. Will absolutely return for the diving.

reviews.author: Rafael S.
reviews.text: I've stayed in many hotels across Southeast Asia. This one stands out for its warmth and authenticity. The chef's fish dish was the best meal of my Bali trip.

reviews.author: Noa L.
reviews.text: Quiet, beautiful, and completely stress-free. The spa massage after a full day of diving was pure heaven. One of our best holidays ever.

reviews.author: Erik H.
reviews.text: We came for Liberty wreck diving and stayed for the peace of this place. Exceptional dive shop nearby and the hotel sorted everything without any fuss.

reviews.author: Claudia M.
reviews.text: Swiss precision meets Balinese soul at this hotel. Everything just works — and beautifully. The garden view from our cottage felt like waking into a painting.

reviews.author: Anna W.
reviews.text: Candidasa is a revelation — calm, real, unspoiled. This hotel captures it perfectly. The staff remembered our coffee order by day two.

reviews.author: Jakub N.
reviews.text: We were looking for a true escape and found it. No beach clubs, no noise — just ocean, coral, kindness and the best nasi goreng of the whole trip.

reviews.author: Sara Al-M.
reviews.text: A perfect retreat. Clean, tasteful rooms and a staff that genuinely cares. The private beach area at sunrise is magical.

reviews.author: Priya R.
reviews.text: East Bali is completely different from what tourists usually see. This hotel is the best way to experience it — peaceful, beautiful, and the food is superb.

reviews.author: Mei L.
reviews.text: We've done many Bali trips and always ended up in the same places. This time we ventured east and won't go back. The coral reef at the beach is exceptional.

reviews.author: Josh T.
reviews.text: Travelling from the other side of the world was worth every hour. The hotel is warm and intimate, the reef is stunning, and Candidasa itself is a gem.

reviews.author: Siobhan M.
reviews.text: A hidden paradise. Friendly, unhurried, genuinely beautiful. The garden at dusk with the sound of the ocean is something I'll carry home with me.

reviews.author: Pierre D.
reviews.text: We've been coming to Bali for fifteen years and only just discovered East Bali. This is what we've been missing — quiet, authentic, and beautifully run.

reviews.author: Mette A.
reviews.text: The staff here are among the kindest I've encountered anywhere in the world. Nothing was too much trouble. Simply a joy to stay.

reviews.author: Lars B.
reviews.text: Came for the diving, stayed for the whole experience. The hotel team arranged transfers, boat, and gear — everything went flawlessly.

reviews.author: Maria S.
reviews.text: Beautiful property with incredibly warm staff. The pool is stunning and the surrounding garden is lush. A genuine slice of paradise far from the tourist trail.

reviews.author: João F.
reviews.text: Candidasa is a revelation and this hotel does it justice. We had five perfect nights here. The freshly caught fish at the restaurant was outstanding.

reviews.author: Olena K.
reviews.text: Quiet and beautiful — everything you could want from a Bali holiday without the crowds. Staff are warm and helpful. The beach area is lovely.

reviews.author: Mikko V.
reviews.text: We arrived stressed and left completely renewed. The combination of quiet rooms, a beautiful pool, and excellent food worked on us like medicine.

reviews.author: Valentina R.
reviews.text: One of the best decisions of our whole trip was choosing to stay here. East Bali is so different — calmer, greener, more authentic. Perfect hotel.

reviews.author: Thabo M.
reviews.text: First time in Bali and I was overwhelmed by how peaceful this corner is. The staff looked after us brilliantly and the diving exceeded every expectation.

reviews.author: Lucía B.
reviews.text: A genuinely magical place. The sunset over the ocean from the pool terrace was breathtaking. The hotel team made our anniversary truly unforgettable.

reviews.author: Ádám K.
reviews.text: Exactly what we were looking for — peaceful, beautiful, away from the crowds. The outdoor breakfast surrounded by tropical plants each morning was extraordinary.

reviews.author: Eleni P.
reviews.text: Having grown up by the sea I'm picky about coastal hotels. This one earned every star. The reef, the staff, the food — all exceptional.

reviews.author: Wei Z.
reviews.text: Beautiful hotel in a wonderful location. Everything was clean, well-organised, and the staff could not have been more helpful. Perfect Bali escape.

reviews.author: Aisha H.
reviews.text: We're just a short flight from Bali but had never visited Candidasa. This hotel made us feel like we'd found a secret. Already planning to return.

reviews.author: Nattaporn S.
reviews.text: We've visited Bali many times and always stayed in Seminyak. A friend recommended East Bali and this hotel. We will never make that mistake again.

reviews.author: Hsiao-Wen C.
reviews.text: Perfect getaway from Taipei's pace. The tranquility here is total. Beautiful gardens, warm staff, and a beach that feels entirely your own.

reviews.author: Charlotte B.
reviews.text: Stumbled across this gem while researching East Bali. Six nights flew by. The staff, the food, the reef — all wonderful. Already booked for next year.

reviews.author: Michael R.
reviews.text: We almost skipped East Bali for another Ubud stay. So glad we didn't. This hotel is understated elegance in a breathtaking location.

reviews.author: Antoine L.
reviews.text: A genuine discovery. The setting is magnificent, the staff are attentive, and the local cuisine is delicious. East Bali is something special.

reviews.author: Isabelle T.
reviews.text: We combined a week here with a few days in Ubud and this was the highlight. The hotel has a quiet magic that's hard to put into words.

reviews.author: Liam W.
reviews.text: Perth to Candidasa is a long way but absolutely worth it. The diving at Liberty wreck is world-class and this hotel is the perfect base for it.

reviews.author: Giulia R.
reviews.text: We travel every year looking for somewhere authentic and unhurried. We found it here. The whole stay felt like a gift.

reviews.author: Tomáš H.
reviews.text: The coral garden right off the beach is one of the best snorkelling spots I've ever seen. Hotel staff are genuinely lovely. Will be back.
